name: es-toolkit (Modern Lodash Alternative)

performance.notes: 2-3x faster than Lodash; smaller bundle size; native implementations where possible

agent_readiness.notes: Modern JavaScript utility library — faster and smaller than Lodash. TypeScript-first. Functions: array (chunk, compact, difference, flatten, groupBy, intersection, partition, range, uniq, zip), object (cloneDeep, merge, omit, pick), function (debounce, throttle, once, memoize), math (clamp, sum, mean), string (camelCase, kebabCase, snakeCase, trim). Tree-shakeable. 97% smaller than Lodash for equivalent operations. Lodash compat mode available. Remeda is FP alternative.

gotchas: Younger project — not all Lodash functions covered yet
API has some differences from Lodash
best_when: New projects needing utility functions (Lodash replacement)
avoid_when: Need specific Lodash functions not yet in es-toolkit
summary: es-toolkit is a modern TypeScript-first utility library — faster and smaller than Lodash. 2-3x performance improvement, 97% smaller bundle for equivalent operations. Covers array (chunk, groupBy, uniq), object (cloneDeep, pick, omit), function (debounce, throttle), string (camelCase, kebabCase) operations. Tree-shakeable. Lodash compat mode available. Best choice for new TypeScript projects needing utility functions.
